controlSet.description: Bind every commitment to an accountable controller, delegated mandate, policy version, and commitment class.
Represent terms, activation conditions, constraints, counterparties, and reliance assumptions in machine-verifiable form.
Require a proof-carrying commitment receipt before external reliance is permitted.
Declare reconciliation, dispute, and retirement paths for commitments that conflict, drift, or fail.

rules: Bind every commitment to an accountable controller, delegated mandate, policy version, and commitment class.
Represent terms, activation conditions, constraints, counterparties, and reliance assumptions in machine-verifiable form.
Require a proof-carrying commitment receipt before external reliance is permitted.
Declare reconciliation, dispute, and retirement paths for commitments that conflict, drift, or fail.

threats.description: A machine creates reliance without an accountable authority chain.
The commitment changes meaning or feasibility without mediation.
A breached machine commitment lacks reconciliation or dispute handling.

transitions.trigger: supersession or replacement by stronger artifact

notes: This package is authored as TSMM-native source, not as a legacy secondary representation.
Controls and lifecycle semantics are extracted from the package-local TSMM model.
